---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, tool, or capability for the Kenbun agent.
title: 'feat: [Short Title]'
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Proposal
A clear and concise description of what the proposed feature is.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm frustrated when...")

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
A clear description of how you want this feature to be implemented. Include code snippets or mock CLI flows if applicable.

## 🏛️ Neural Hierarchy Impact (System 1-6)
Where does this feature fit within Kenbun's architectural layers?
*   [ ] **System 1 (Autonomic / Reflexive):** Low-level IO, FastMCP integrations.
*   [ ] **System 2 (Analytical / Rigid):** Audits, compliance, linter-autofix logic.
*   [ ] **System 3 (Memory / Hivemind):** Vector storage, ChromaDB, local caching.
*   [ ] **System 4 (Empathetic / Voice):** Interface dynamics, speech pipelines.
*   [ ] **System 5 (Executive / Swarm):** Orchestrator, multi-agent coordination.
*   [ ] **System 6 (Speculative / Foresight):** Planning, multi-turn predictions.

## ⚖️ Scalability & Resource Cost
*   Does this feature require online/cloud APIs (e.g. Gemini) or can it run entirely offline on standard CPU models (e.g. Llama 3.2 3B)?
*   What is the estimated impact on RAM and disk usage?
